mapper.select: select dailymonitor.* , patient.name AS patientName,nurse.name AS nurseName,ward.name AS wardName,hp.bed_num AS bedNum FROM dailymonitor LEFT JOIN patient ON dailymonitor.patient_id = patient.id LEFT JOIN nurse ON dailymonitor.nurse_id = nurse.id LEFT JOIN ward ON dailymonitor.ward_id = ward.id LEFT JOIN hp ON dailymonitor.bed_id = hp.id
